raw_text:
{
  "site_name": "Girlfriend AI",
  "base_url": "https://girlfriend.ai",
  "chat_url": "https://girlfriend.ai/chat/:slug",
  "transport": "websocket",
  "create_guest_url": "https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signUp?key=AIzaSyCJEe4WZGBYy_kSZb7QAtnj9vxY-nAVCuE",
  "login_by_guest_url": null,
  "get_account_url": "https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/profile",
  "create_session_url": "https://girlfriend.ai/v2/api/auth/session",
  "get_chat_setting_url": null,
  "get_sessions_url": "https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/chats",
  "get_chat_messages_url": null,
  "send_url": null,
  "stream_url": null,
  "websocket_url": "wss://prod.girlfriend.ai/ws?token={token}",
  "graphql_url": null,
  "bot_id": null,
  "required_headers": {
    "authorization": "Bearer {idToken}",
    "content-type": "application/json",
    "accept": "application/json"
  },
  "payload_hints": {
    "create_guest": {
      "returnSecureToken": true
    },
    "get_account": {},
    "get_sessions": {},
    "create_session": {}
  },
  "conversation_history_format": null,
  "token_location": "authorization header as Bearer token",
  "session_id_location": null,
  "verification_strategy": "websocket_only",
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": "The app uses Firebase Authentication for guest user creation and session management. The main chat communication is done over a websocket connection with a JWT token passed as a query parameter. No direct REST API endpoints for sending or streaming chat messages were observed; interaction likely happens via websocket frames. The authorization token is a Firebase ID token used in the Authorization header for REST calls and as a token query parameter for websocket. The app fetches user profile and chat sessions via REST API endpoints under /api-gateway/api/v2/. The create_guest_url is the Firebase signUp endpoint. The create_session_url is a POST to /v2/api/auth/session. No explicit login_by_guest_url or send_url observed. The chat URL pattern includes a slug for the persona. No GraphQL endpoints observed."
}
